investigate.description: Read and map the codebase before implementing anything

review.description: Pre-commit code review gate — surface issues before they merge
review.template: Run the /review workflow on the current diff

commit.description: Audit, validate, and commit staged changes with a clean conventional commit

pr.description: Generate a full PR body and GitHub compare URL — no gh CLI needed
pr.template: Run the /pr workflow for the current branch against main
